requirement_topic.en: Barqi Tojik Grid Connection for BESS — 50 Hz System, IEC 62933, and Project-Specific Connection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: Barqi Tojik BESS并网——50 Hz系统、IEC 62933及项目专属并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: Barqi Tojik BESS併網——50 Hz系統、IEC 62933及項目專屬併網要求

summary.en: Barqi Tojik (Open Joint Stock Holding Company Barqi Tojik) is Tajikistan's state-owned vertically-integrated electricity utility and the primary grid operator, under the Ministry of Energy and Water Resources of the Republic of Tajikistan. All grid-connected BESS installations — including utility-scale solar-plus-storage projects and behind-the-meter installations — require Barqi Tojik technical approval and connection agreement. Tajikistan's grid operates at 50 Hz (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase at the low-voltage distribution level), the same nominal frequency as China, but grid stability characteristics differ: the national grid is predominantly hydropower-dependent (~95% of generation), resulting in severe seasonal output variation and winter energy deficits that create intermittency and frequency excursion risk. BESS power conversion systems (PCS) must be validated for Tajikistan's 50 Hz grid, including frequency ride-through and voltage protection settings appropriate for a hydropower-dominated grid with limited spinning reserve. Donor-funded BESS projects (World Bank, ADB, EBRD) typically incorporate IEC 62933-2-1 and IEC 62933-5-2 requirements into technical specifications. A publicly accessible Barqi Tojik technical specification document specifically for BESS grid connection has not been confirmed as of the dataset date; project-specific connection terms must be obtained directly from Barqi Tojik and coordinating donor/lender technical advisors.
summary.zh: Barqi Tojik（塔吉克电力开放式联合股份控股公司）是塔吉克斯坦的国有垂直整合电力公司和主要电网运营商，隶属于塔吉克斯坦共和国能源和水资源部。所有并网BESS装置——包括公用事业规模太阳能+储能项目和表后装置——均须取得Barqi Tojik技术审查和并网协议。塔吉克斯坦电网以50 Hz运行（低压配电级单相220 V、三相380 V），与中国名义频率相同，但电网稳定性特征不同：国家电网以水电为主（约占发电量95%），导致季节性产出差异显著和冬季能源短缺，产生间歇性和频率偏差风险。BESS储能变流器（PCS）须针对塔吉克斯坦50 Hz电网进行验证，包括适合旋转备用有限的水电主导电网的频率穿越和电压保护设置。捐助方资助的BESS项目（世界银行、亚行、欧洲复兴开发银行）通常在技术规格中纳入IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2要求。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认Barqi Tojik公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格文件；项目专属并网条款须直接向Barqi Tojik及协调捐助方/贷款方技术顾问获取。
summary.zht: Barqi Tojik（塔吉克電力開放式聯合股份控股公司）是塔吉克斯坦的國有垂直整合電力公司和主要電網運營商，隸屬於塔吉克斯坦共和國能源和水資源部。所有併網BESS裝置——包括公用事業規模太陽能+儲能項目和表後裝置——均須取得Barqi Tojik技術審查和併網協議。塔吉克斯坦電網以50 Hz運行（低壓配電級單相220 V、三相380 V），與中國名義頻率相同，但電網穩定性特徵不同：國家電網以水電為主（約佔發電量95%），導致季節性產出差異顯著和冬季能源短缺，產生間歇性和頻率偏差風險。BESS儲能變流器（PCS）須針對塔吉克斯坦50 Hz電網進行驗證，包括適合旋轉備用有限的水電主導電網的頻率穿越和電壓保護設置。捐助方資助的BESS項目（世界銀行、亞行、歐洲復興開發銀行）通常在技術規格中納入IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2要求。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認Barqi Tojik公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格文件；項目專屬併網條款須直接向Barqi Tojik及協調捐助方/貸款方技術顧問獲取。

standards_or_laws: Barqi Tojik connection agreement — technical requirements for generation and storage assets connected to Tajikistan's grid (project-specific; no publicly confirmed standalone BESS grid-connection specification as of dataset date)
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected reference in donor-funded project specifications)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected reference in donor-funded project specifications)
Tajikistan Ministry of Energy and Water Resources — sector regulatory authority
GOST 13109-97 — Нормы качества электрической энергии (Power quality norms; adopted from former Soviet standard, applicable in Tajikistan)

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid also operates at 50 Hz with 220 V single-phase and 380 V three-phase at the distribution level, matching Tajikistan's nominal voltage — unlike the Qatar 240/415 V difference. However, grid protection settings, frequency ride-through tolerances, and SCADA/communication protocol requirements in Tajikistan are project-specific and may differ from Chinese NEA-standard parameters, particularly for high-altitude deployments above 2,000 m where derating and insulation specifications diverge.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2023（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网同样以50 Hz运行，配电级单相220 V、三相380 V，与塔吉克斯坦名义电压一致——有别于卡塔尔240/415 V的差异。然而，塔吉克斯坦的电网保护设置、频率穿越容差和SCADA/通信协议要求具有项目专属性，可能与中国NEA标准参数不同，尤其是在2,000米以上高海拔部署时，降额和绝缘规格存在差异。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2023（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網同樣以50 Hz運行，配電級單相220 V、三相380 V，與塔吉克斯坦名義電壓一致——有別於卡達240/415 V的差異。然而，塔吉克斯坦的電網保護設置、頻率穿越容差和SCADA/通訊協議要求具有項目專屬性，可能與中國NEA標準參數不同，尤其是在2,000米以上高海拔部署時，降額和絕緣規格存在差異。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy Barqi Tojik's grid-connection requirements. Key issues requiring attention: (a) although Tajikistan's nominal voltage (220/380 V, 50 Hz) matches China's, grid protection and ride-through settings must be validated for Tajikistan's hydropower-dominated grid conditions, seasonal frequency variations, and any Barqi Tojik-specific requirements set out in the project connection agreement; (b) high-altitude derating — many BESS sites in Tajikistan are above 1,500–3,000 m; Chinese standard type-test conditions (typically ≤1,000 m for full-rated performance) may not cover actual site altitude without explicit altitude derating analysis and evidence; (c) cold-climate performance — winter temperatures below −20 °C require validated battery management system (BMS) low-temperature cut-off and heating strategy; (d) IEC 62933 series compliance — donor-funded projects (World Bank, ADB) typically require IEC 62933-2-1 and IEC 62933-5-2 evidence; GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent by international lender technical advisors; (e) SCADA/communication protocol — confirm the protocol required by Barqi Tojik (IEC 61850, DNP3, or project-specific) for BESS monitoring and dispatch; (f) engage Barqi Tojik and the donor/lender technical team at the earliest project stage to determine connection agreement requirements before equipment procurement is finalised.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足Barqi Tojik的并网要求。需注意的关键问题：（a）尽管塔吉克斯坦名义电压（220/380 V、50 Hz）与中国一致，但电网保护和穿越参数须针对塔吉克斯坦以水电为主的电网条件、季节性频率变化及Barqi Tojik项目并网协议规定的专项要求进行验证；（b）高海拔降额——塔吉克斯坦许多BESS场址位于1,500～3,000米以上；中国标准型式试验条件（通常≤1,000米为全额定性能）在无明确高海拔降额分析和证据的情况下可能无法覆盖实际场址海拔；（c）寒冷气候性能——冬季气温低于−20°C须验证电池管理系统（BMS）低温截止和加热策略；（d）IEC 62933系列合规——捐助方资助项目（世界银行、亚行）通常要求IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2证据；GB/T标准不被国际贷款方技术顾问接受为等效依据；（e）SCADA/通信协议——确认Barqi Tojik对BESS监控和调度所要求的协议（IEC 61850、DNP3或项目专属）；（f）在设备采购最终确定前，于项目最早阶段与Barqi Tojik及捐助方/贷款方技术团队接触，以确定并网协议要求。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足Barqi Tojik的併網要求。需注意的關鍵問題：（a）儘管塔吉克斯坦名義電壓（220/380 V、50 Hz）與中國一致，但電網保護和穿越參數須針對塔吉克斯坦以水電為主的電網條件、季節性頻率變化及Barqi Tojik項目併網協議規定的專項要求進行驗證；（b）高海拔降額——塔吉克斯坦許多BESS場址位於1,500～3,000米以上；中國標準型式試驗條件（通常≤1,000米為全額定性能）在無明確高海拔降額分析和證據的情況下可能無法覆蓋實際場址海拔；（c）寒冷氣候性能——冬季氣溫低於−20°C須驗證電池管理系統（BMS）低溫截止和加熱策略；（d）IEC 62933系列合規——捐助方資助項目（世界銀行、亞行）通常要求IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2證據；GB/T標準不被國際貸款方技術顧問接受為等效依據；（e）SCADA/通訊協議——確認Barqi Tojik對BESS監控和調度所要求的協議（IEC 61850、DNP3或項目專屬）；（f）在設備採購最終確定前，於項目最早階段與Barqi Tojik及捐助方/貸款方技術團隊接觸，以確定併網協議要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Barqi Tojik grid-connection approval is required for all grid-connected BESS in Tajikistan; technical requirements are project-specific and defined in the connection agreement; donor-funded projects additionally governed by lender technical specifications
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Tajikistan

source.publisher: Barqi Tojik (Open Joint Stock Holding Company Barqi Tojik — Tajikistan state electricity utility)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy Barqi Tojik's Tajikistan grid-connection requirements. While nominal voltage (220/380 V, 50 Hz) matches China, project-specific protection settings, high-altitude derating (sites above 1,500 m), cold-climate performance validation (below −20 °C), and IEC 62933 compliance for donor-funded projects represent material gaps. Engage Barqi Tojik and the donor/lender technical advisor at the earliest project stage to determine connection agreement requirements, IEC 62933 evidence scope, altitude/cold-climate derating protocol, and SCADA communication specification. No publicly confirmed standalone Barqi Tojik BESS technical specification has been identified as of the dataset date.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足Barqi Tojik塔吉克斯坦并网要求。尽管名义电压（220/380 V、50 Hz）与中国一致，但项目专属保护参数、高海拔降额（场址超过1,500米）、寒冷气候性能验证（低于−20°C）以及捐助方资助项目的IEC 62933合规构成实质性差距。应在项目最早阶段与Barqi Tojik及捐助方/贷款方技术顾问接触，确定并网协议要求、IEC 62933证据范围、高海拔/寒冷气候降额协议及SCADA通信规格。截至本数据集日期，尚未发现Barqi Tojik公开确认的独立BESS技术规格。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足Barqi Tojik塔吉克斯坦併網要求。儘管名義電壓（220/380 V、50 Hz）與中國一致，但項目專屬保護參數、高海拔降額（場址超過1,500米）、寒冷氣候性能驗證（低於−20°C）以及捐助方資助項目的IEC 62933合規構成實質性差距。應在項目最早階段與Barqi Tojik及捐助方/貸款方技術顧問接觸，確定併網協議要求、IEC 62933證據範圍、高海拔/寒冷氣候降額協議及SCADA通訊規格。截至本數據集日期，尚未發現Barqi Tojik公開確認的獨立BESS技術規格。
